title: Launcher --sudo probe: File.Exists check before ConnectAsync
desc: v6.0.1 fix for HANDSHAKE-MISS false positives on cold-start sudo. Launcher/Program.cs checks File.Exists('\.\pipe\wkappbot_elevated') BEFORE ConnectAsync. If pipe file is absent, admin Eye hasn't been spawned yet (cold start) -- quiet fallthrough to Core which will handle UAC + SudoHandler.EnsureAdminForSudo. If pipe file EXISTS but ConnectAsync fails, real zombie -- that's when we fire the HANDSHAKE MISS banner + bug-auto suggest. Previous fastFailMs=100 elapsed-based heuristic mis-classified every cold-start as handshake miss (merged 34x in 33h). Keeps v6.0 pipe separation: wkappbot_eye_ipc (normal Eye tick) and wkappbot_elevated (admin Eye cmd proxy) must never mix. Affects --all commands via --sudo flag.
steps: Launcher Program.cs --sudo branch calls File.Exists pipe path on wkappbot_elevated before any ConnectAsync.
Cold start (pipe file absent) -> quiet log 'admin Eye pipe not present -- Core will spawn (cold start, not a handshake miss)', NO handshake miss banner.

Pipe present -> do the 1500ms ConnectAsync; on failure re-check File.Exists. If pipe disappeared mid-probe (race), treat as cold start. If still present but ConnectAsync failed, real regression -> ReportHandshakeMiss.
Affects wkappbot --all commands because --sudo can be appended to any of them (wkappbot <anything> --sudo routes through this probe).
Evidence: test-launcher-sudo-handshake-miss-cold-start.cmd greps source for pipeFileExists guard + disappeared-during-probe race handling, plus wkappbot.exe rebuild freshness.
author: claude
